notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 voltage_channel labels → FreeGSNKE active circuit order (machine_authority/active_coils.pickle control coils). Units are volts (V) from zarr attrs. Circuits without a Level-2 voltage channel declare default_V=0 explicitly (zero-drive), not silent invention.

Solenoid.notes: FAIR-MAST p1 is the solenoid/OH voltage channel (zarr attrs link AMC_SOL to /xdc/pf/f/p1); units V.

PX.notes: FAIR-MAST voltage channel p2 mapped to FreeGSNKE MAST-U-like circuit PX (active_coils.pickle has no P2 label). Explicit cross-machine declaration.

D1.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D1; explicit zero-drive declaration.

D2.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D2; explicit zero-drive declaration.

D3.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D3; explicit zero-drive declaration.

Dp.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for Dp; explicit zero-drive declaration.

D5.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D5; explicit zero-drive declaration.

D6.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D6; explicit zero-drive declaration.

D7.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for D7; explicit zero-drive declaration.

P4.notes: FAIR-MAST p4 → FreeGSNKE P4; units V.

P5.notes: FAIR-MAST p5 → FreeGSNKE P5; units V.

P6.notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 has no voltage channel for P6; explicit zero-drive declaration.
